nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 索马里
nodes.summary: 索马里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联143种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等143种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bristle-crowned starling

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Bristle-crowned starling
nodes.summary: The bristle-crowned starling (Onychognathus salvadorii) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and Uganda. References
